{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Successor
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Successor]] is located in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[King]]'s daughter is his [[Successor]] and a worthy [[Traveler of Ragnarus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
